name: Pickup Note
description: Quick note before the downbeat launches the phrase

simple: quick pickup note before the downbeat launches the phrase
standard: quick pickup note before the downbeat launches the phrase
anticipatory eighth note leading into the main melody
saxophone grace note sliding up to starting pitch
detailed: quick pickup note before the downbeat launches the phrase
anticipatory eighth note leading into the main melody
saxophone grace note sliding up to starting pitch
drummer's quick flam before the accent
bass player sliding up to the root note

instruments: wire brushes swirling on snare head
